hero.subtitle: Enter a description or lyrics, and AI composes, writes, and generates cover art. No music skills needed — create original music in minutes.

compose.title: AI Smart Composition
compose.desc: Powered by MiniMax, automatically generate melodies, harmonies, and arrangements from descriptions. Multiple genres from pop to electronic.

lyrics.title: Smart Lyrics Generation
lyrics.desc: Auto-generate lyrics with structural tag control. Edit, continue writing, and precisely control Verse, Chorus, Bridge sections.

cover.title: AI Cover Design
cover.desc: Each song automatically generates a unique AI cover image, perfectly matching the song's style. 1:1 square format, supports full-size view.

dual.title: Dual-Mode Creation
dual.desc: Simple mode for one-click songs, pro mode for fine-grained control over sample rate, bitrate, format, and more parameters.

creation.label: Create
creation.title: Start Creating
creation.songDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the song you want to create, e.g.: A light pop song about a summer beach with electronic elements...
creation.autoHint: AI will automatically generate lyrics and melody based on the description
creation.generating: Generating, please be patient as it may take a while....
creation.simpleModeNoLyricsHint: Simple mode does not support custom lyrics. Use Pro mode to edit lyrics.

proMode.stylePlaceholder: Describe the style, mood, and scene...

settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyDesc: Your API Key is stored locally in your browser and never uploaded to the server.

production.downloadWarning: Please download and save now. Music cannot be recovered after closing the page.
